title: Is there a limit to how many columns I can add in a single board?

posts.author: emilyw-monday.com (Emily Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Joy,

Thanks for the question!

In order to ensure high performance in the boards of our customers, we limit the number of items and columns per board:

10K items and 200 columns for non-enterprise users
20k items and 300 columns for enterprise users

Hope this helps,
Emily

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.

posts.author: amber (Amber from monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Update:

The column limit has been increased to 500 per board.
Ent users with mondayDB 2.0 scale capability (currently in gradual release) can have up to 100k items per board
